title: Uncraftable Items Refreshed
description: Adds 18 recipes so you can craft some uncraftable items in Minecraft 1.21!
body:
If you've been playing Minecraft for a good amount of time, you know the pain of not being able to craft things like Name Tags or Saddles. Luckily, this Data Pack can fix that!

This Data Pack adds 18 new recipes to Minecraft 1.21.x for uncraftable items such as the Bell, Saddle, Name Tag, and even the Elytra! (dont worry its still not easy to craft) 

See the [gallery](https://modrinth.com/datapack/uncraftable-items-refreshed/gallery) for all the recipes!

This Data Pack is a port of [Uncraftable Items](https://modrinth.com/datapack/uncraftable-recipes) by [eriiic](https://modrinth.com/user/eriiic) to 1.21, as the original Data Pack is stuck on 1.19.x and 1.20-1.20.1. If the Data Pack gets updated to 1.21, I will archive this Data Pack out of respect for [eriiic](https://modrinth.com/user/eriiic)
